summary: Virtual sleep apnea care network with at-home testing and follow-up.
editor_note: Sleep apnea care usually makes patients coordinate the system; Ognomy makes the care path the product. It combines virtual specialist visits, FDA-cleared home tests, insurance checks, treatment orders, and follow-up across all 50 states. Unlike referral-only telehealth, the bet is sleep care without the lab bottleneck.

sources.label: Ognomy Sleep What to Expect page

product_evidence.claim: The official What to Expect page says patients can start with $25+, be seen in days, use at-home testing, and access in-network coverage for more than 200 million people.
The official Doctors page describes provider referrals by EMR, fax, or self-registration and sends digital sleep-study reports back to referring clinicians.
Ognomy's Series A page says it has completed 85,000+ patient visits, operates across all 50 states, and moves patients nine times faster than traditional sleep treatment.

market_context.primary_user: Patients with suspected obstructive sleep apnea, referring clinicians, and employers or payers that need faster sleep-care access.
market_context.differentiation: Ognomy Sleep manages the care path from virtual visit to home sleep test, treatment order, and adherence follow-up rather than stopping at referral intake.
market_context.why_now: The Series A follows 85,000+ patient visits, national coverage, and rising payer interest in at-home diagnostics and remote cardiometabolic care.

risks.claim: The falsifiable risk is whether clinical quality and adherence stay high as Ognomy expands across more insurers, states, and treatment paths.
risks.basis: VentureDex assessment from official care-flow pages and Series A coverage.
